prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it addresses environmental regulations and risk management practices that are relevant to waste handling, which are applicable under the Scottish environmental framework. Additionally, environmental risk assessments and permits can be relevant across the UK, including Scotland.
